summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all core functionality: glob patterns (**, *, ? conversion and matching), label assignment, deduplication, priority ordering, and workflow structure validation. 43+ test cases organized across 10 iterations using clear Pester syntax. Good edge case coverage (empty inputs, nested paths, path normalization, multiple rules, sorted output). Integration layer via Run-Tests.ps1 validates workflow via act with expected-value assertions. Minor gaps: error-scenario testing (null inputs, malformed rules, invalid objects) under-represented; exception handling not explicitly verified despite being mentioned in task requirements. Workflow file (.github/workflows/pr-label-assigner.yml) expected by tests but not provided in test-code section—likely implementation artifact. Test design is well-structured with independent cases and clean BeforeAll fixtures; mixing unit and workflow-structure tests in single Describe is acceptable for scope.
